name: Old School Hallway
summary: The second-floor hallway of the old school building, where no one comes after class. The wooden floor creaks, the setting sun slants in through a row of old windows, and at the far end is a window that is always half open.

details.mood: Sunset, dust drifting in the light, the sounds of the distant field never reaching this far. Footsteps echo down the empty hallway.
features: Someone once carved a small line of words into the windowsill with a pencil, now almost too faint to read.
The half-open window at the end of the hallway faces that cherry-blossom slope.
This is the very place where, legend says, 'if you speak your true feelings, your wish will come true'.
